query:
SELECT 
  a.id AS assessment_id,
  a.claim_id,
  a.estimated_cost,
  a.fraud_risk_level,
  a.structural_damage_severity,
  a.accident_type,
  a.confidence_score,
  a.fraud_risk_score,
  LEFT(a.damage_description, 100) AS damage_desc,
  a.created_at
FROM ai_assessments a
WHERE a.estimated_cost IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
